final_prompt.prompt:
Generate a YouTube thumbnail for Marvel's Spider-Man 2 video game.

风格/媒介: AAA video game thumbnail style, anime-inspired, polished and cinematic feel, high energy
构图:
  Character centered in foreground, large and dominant
  Bold oversized text on one side
  Background fills the scene with depth and action elements
主体:
  Muscular anime-style warrior character redesigned as Spider-Man
  Same crossed-arm pose, floating seated position, sharp eyes, high brown ponytail
  Black-and-red Spider-Man symbiote-style suit with glowing white spider emblem across the chest
  Subtle web textures and futuristic armored details on the suit
  Giant sword on his back
  Intense, confident expression
场景/背景:
  Dramatic nighttime New York City skyline
  Lightning, glowing neon lights, destroyed streets
  Faint Venom silhouette and another Spider-Man silhouette visible behind the character
  Spider-Man 2 action elements throughout
光线/氛围:
  Blue and red lighting effects
  Dramatic shadows, glowing highlights
  Motion blur, sparks, smoke
  High energy, cinematic intensity
色彩方案: Highly saturated, strong contrast, black and red dominant with blue/red lighting accents
材质/纹理: Symbiote suit texture, web pattern details, futuristic armor plating
文字(原样): PART 1
约束: Looks like an official Marvel's Spider-Man 2 YouTube thumbnail with maximum click-through appeal
避免:

error: 重试 10 次仍失败 · 最后:生图失败
